title: samara myrtillus
intro: Samara myrtillus, also known as bilberry, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the heath family. The medicinal properties of bilberry include its high content of anthocyanins, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Bilberry has been associated with several health benefits, including improved vision, reduced risk of cardiovascular disease, and enhanced cognitive function. Bilberry is commonly used in herbal preparations, such as capsules, teas, and jams, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
